hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处；【FINANCE】尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资；【FINANCE】预测市场正在加剧各州和联邦监管机构之间的高风险争吵。

items.title: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.summary: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处
items.summary_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title: Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction market investments
items.summary: Companies reiterated plans to growing their prediction markets businesses in recent earnings calls even as a regulatory debate continues.
items.title_zh: 尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资
items.summary_zh: 尽管监管争论仍在继续，但公司在最近的财报电话会议上重申了发展预测市场业务的计划。

items.title: Prediction markets are fueling a high-stakes brawl between states and federal regulators
items.summary: Sixteen states are in legal proceedings against prediction market platforms, while one state has moved to ban them.
items.title_zh: 预测市场正在加剧各州和联邦监管机构之间的高风险争吵
items.summary_zh: 十六个州正在对预测市场平台提起法律诉讼，而一个州已采取行动禁止它们。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Threatens to Retaliate for U.S. Strikes as Talks Continue
items.summary: The threat by Iran’s Revolutionary Guards Corps came after American military forces attacked sites near the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：随着谈判的继续，伊朗威胁要对美国的袭击进行报复
items.summary_zh: 在美国军队袭击霍尔木兹海峡附近的地点后，伊朗革命卫队发出了威胁。

items.title: The Wars in Ukraine and Iran Are More Alike Than You May Think
items.summary: Aspects such as drone technology and diplomacy show how the wars intersect on the battlefield and in global alignments, providing a model for future conflicts.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰和伊朗的战争比你想象的更相似
items.summary_zh: 无人机技术和外交等方面展示了战争如何在战场上和全球联盟中交叉，为未来的冲突提供了模型。

items.title: Live markets: bitcoin on sidelines as markets surge on Iran peace hopes
items.summary: Oil prices and bond yields have opened the week sharply lower following President Trump's weekend announcement of an imminent Middle East agreement.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着伊朗和平希望市场飙升，比特币处于观望状态
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统周末宣布即将达成中东协议后，油价和债券收益率本周开盘大幅走低。

items.title: Strive leapfrogs Coinbase, Riot with latest $85.4 million bitcoin buy
items.summary: Vivek Ramaswamy-founded Strive now ranks as the seventh-largest public corporate bitcoin holder, trailing Bullish.
items.title_zh: Strive 最新买入 8540 万美元比特币，超越 Coinbase 和 Riot
items.summary_zh: Vivek Ramaswamy 创立的 Strive 目前是第七大上市公司比特币持有者，落后于 Bullish。

items.title: ‘Optimism looks fragile’: Bitcoin wavers as Iran strikes revive geopolitical tensions and analysts warn of range trap
items.summary: Analysts warn of a range trap as underwater bitcoin buyers build resistance near $79,000 and tensions flare again in the Middle East.
items.title_zh: “乐观情绪看起来很脆弱”：伊朗袭击重燃地缘政治紧张局势，比特币动摇，分析师警告区间陷阱
items.summary_zh: 分析师警告称，随着水下比特币买家在 79,000 美元附近建立阻力，中东紧张局势再次加剧，可能会出现区间陷阱。

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
items.title_zh: OpenAI、Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 宣布战略内容合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Grupo Folha 和 Grupo UOL 合作，将值得信赖的巴西新闻引入 ChatGPT，通过归属和透明度扩大对新闻的访问。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Surge in 'risk-free' treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities
items.summary: Treasury yield surge shows bond market is not 'risk free' after all, but there's opportunity for fixed-income investors in intermediates, BBBs and high yield.
items.title_zh: “无风险”国债收益率飙升促使债券投资者寻找更好的机会
items.summary_zh: 国债收益率飙升表明债券市场毕竟并非“无风险”，但中间品、BBB 和高收益债券的固定收益投资者仍有机会。

items.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
items.summary: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.
items.title_zh: 矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 为爱达荷州黄金、锑项目获得 29 亿美元美国贷款
items.summary_zh: 由于美国希望获得关键矿产，矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 已从美国进出口银行获得 29 亿美元贷款。

items.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
items.summary: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.
items.title_zh: 伊朗谴责美国空袭“严重违反”停火协议
items.summary_zh: 袭击发生时，伊朗和卡塔尔谈判代表正在多哈进行和平谈判。

items.title: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
items.summary: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" Hezbollah.
items.title_zh: 以色列加强打击，黎巴嫩村庄11人死亡
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡发誓要“镇压”真主党后，以色列表示袭击了黎巴嫩境内的 100 个真主党基础设施​​和武装人员。

items.title: Netanyahu says Israel will intensify strikes against Hezbollah
items.summary: The Israeli military hits targets in eastern Lebanon after the prime minister announces further strikes.
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡称以色列将加强对真主党的打击
items.summary_zh: 在总理宣布进一步袭击后，以色列军队袭击了黎巴嫩东部的目标。

items.title: Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes and tells foreign nationals to leave
items.summary: It comes after the Ukrainian capital suffered one of the biggest aerial assaults of the war overnight on Saturday.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯威胁对基辅发动更多袭击并要求外国人离开
items.summary_zh: 此前，乌克兰首都周六夜间遭受了战争中最严重的空袭之一。

items.title: China executes man for poisoning billionaire gaming tycoon
items.summary: The court said the man poisoned the tycoon for sidelining him after he helped secure a deal with Netflix for the 3 Body Problem.
items.title_zh: 中国处决一名毒害亿万富翁博彩大亨的男子
items.summary_zh: 法院表示，这名男子在帮助与 Netflix 就《三体问题》达成协议后，对这位大亨下毒，因为他让他边缘化。

items.title: At Chelsea Flower Show, a Gnome Controversy and Some ‘Good British Madness’
items.summary: At the prestigious garden show, attendees jockeyed to buy prizewinning blooms and debated the role of whimsy as a ban on garden gnomes was temporarily lifted.
items.title_zh: 切尔西花展上的侏儒争议和一些“英国式的疯狂”
items.summary_zh: 在这场享有盛誉的花园展上，与会者竞相购买获奖花朵，并讨论了奇思妙想的作用，因为对花园侏儒的禁令暂时取消。

items.title: Pope Leo Warns of Risks From A.I. in 42,300-Word Encyclical
items.summary: The document marks a powerful foray by the leader of the Roman Catholic Church into the debate about the misuse or overuse of artificial intelligence.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥警告人工智能带来的风险42,300 字通谕
items.summary_zh: 该文件标志着罗马天主教会领导人对人工智能滥用或过度使用的争论进行了有力的尝试。

items.title: Cubans Cook With Charcoal and Wood Fires to Survive During Energy Crisis
items.summary: The U.S. oil blockade has left millions without cooking gas. In Santiago de Cuba, the cradle of the Cuban revolution, apartment tower residents resort to charcoal and firewood.
items.title_zh: 古巴人在能源危机期间用木炭和木火做饭以求生存
items.summary_zh: 美国的石油封锁导致数百万人没有烹饪用气。在古巴革命的摇篮古巴圣地亚哥，公寓楼的居民依靠木炭和木柴。

items.title: Coinbase’s Base launches AI tool for ChatGPT to manage crypto wallets and DeFi apps
items.summary: The product, called Base MCP, connects a user’s Base Account to AI clients such as ChatGPT, Claude and Cursor using the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an emerging standard that allows AI systems to securely interface with external tools and applications.
items.title_zh: Coinbase’s Base 推出 ChatGPT 人工智能工具来管理加密钱包和 DeFi 应用
items.summary_zh: 该产品名为 Base MCP，使用模型上下文协议 (MCP) 将用户的 Base Account 连接到 ChatGPT、Claude 和 Cursor 等 AI 客户端。MCP 是一种新兴标准，允许 AI 系统安全地与外部工具和应用程序交互。

items.title: Strategy taps cash reserve to retire $1.5 billion in convertible debt
items.summary: Michael Saylor and team funded the repurchases using cash as it restructures liabilities tied to its BTC treasury strategy.
items.title_zh: 战略利用现金储备偿还 15 亿美元的可转换债务
items.summary_zh: Michael Saylor 和团队使用现金为回购提供资金，以重组与其 BTC 财务策略相关的负债。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
items.title_zh: 推进内容来源，打造更安全、更透明的人工智能生态系统
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过内容凭证、SynthID 和验证工具推进 AI 内容来源，帮助人们识别和信任 AI 生成的媒体。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: TeraWulf jumps 13% on AI data center expansion in Kentucky
items.summary: The bitcoin miner turned HPC infrastructure developer unveiled plans for a new 1 gigawatt facility in Kentucky aimed at servicing AI workloads.
items.title_zh: TeraWulf 因肯塔基州 AI 数据中心扩建而股价上涨 13%
items.summary_zh: 这家比特币矿工转型为 HPC 基础设施开发商，公布了在肯塔基州新建 1 吉瓦设施的计划，旨在为人工智能工作负载提供服务。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 1.1%, leading index lower
items.summary: Cronos (CRO), also down 1.1%, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20业绩更新：SUI下跌1.1%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: Cronos (CRO) 也下跌 1.1%，与 Sui (SUI) 一样表现不佳。

items.title: Strive acquires 1,109 bitcoin, raising total holdings to 16,500 coins
items.summary: ASST climbs 133% in three months as Strive grows holdings to 16,500 BTC and explores fresh capital raising options.
items.title_zh: Strive 收购了 1,109 枚比特币，将总持有量增至 16,500 枚
items.summary_zh: 随着 Strive 将持有量增至 16,500 BTC 并探索新的融资方案，ASST 在三个月内上涨了 133%。

items.title: Solana privacy layer Umbra launches confidential vesting with Streamflow targeting $97B token unlock market
items.summary: Umbra and Streamflow launch private token vesting on Solana, letting projects distribute tokens confidentially at scale.
items.title_zh: Solana 隐私层 Umbra 通过 Streamflow 推出机密归属，瞄准 97B 美元的代币解锁市场
items.summary_zh: Umbra 和 Streamflow 在 Solana 上推出私人代币归属，让项目可以大规模秘密地分发代币。

items.title: TeraWulf stock jumps over 12% on news of Kentucky data center site acquisition
items.summary: TeraWulf's $21 million in revenue from its HPC business overtook its bitcoin mining segment for the first time in Q1 2026.
items.title_zh: 肯塔基州数据中心站点收购消息传出后，TeraWulf 股价上涨超过 12%
items.summary_zh: TeraWulf 的 HPC 业务收入 2100 万美元，在 2026 年第一季度首次超过比特币挖矿业务。

items.title: Tether-focused chain Stable launches USDT institutional yield product
items.summary: The USDT-dedicated Layer 1 Stable's new product lets holders earn yield tied to traditional assets like Treasurys and gold.
items.title_zh: 以 Tether 为中心的链稳定推出 USDT 机构收益产品
items.summary_zh: USDT 专用的 Layer 1 Stable 的新产品可以让持有者赚取与国债和黄金等传统资产挂钩的收益。

items.title: Bitmine capitalizes on Ethereum price drop, buys over 100,000 ETH as 5% supply goal nears
items.summary: "We view the recent pullback of ETH to below $2,200 as an attractive opportunity," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said.
items.title_zh: 随着 5% 供应目标接近，Bitmine 利用以太坊价格下跌购买了超过 100,000 ETH
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 董事长 Tom Lee 表示：“我们认为 ETH 最近回调至 2,200 美元以下是一个有吸引力的机会。”

items.title: Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude
items.summary: Co-Invest supports crypto, equities, FX, Polymarket positions and pre-IPO secondaries across over 500 markets, according to Liquid.
items.title_zh: Liquid 推出 Co-Invest 应用程序，将人工智能驱动的实时交易执行引入 ChatGPT 和 Claude
items.summary_zh: 据 Liquid 称，Co-Invest 支持 500 多个市场的加密货币、股票、外汇、Polymarket 头寸和 IPO 前二级市场。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 国家教育的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推进国家教育，通过新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训和工具扩大人工智能在学校的采用，以改善全球学习成果。

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
items.title_zh: AWS 上的基础模型训练和推理的构建块

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
items.summary: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities, despite U.S. restrictions on the company.
items.title_zh: 随着与英伟达和苹果的竞争加剧，华为计划于今年秋季推出新的智能手机芯片
items.summary_zh: 中国电信巨头华为周一宣布了一种新的芯片设计方法，可以提高其性能，尽管美国对该公司实施了限制。

items.title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
items.summary: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.
items.title_zh: APEC的三个迹象表明美国和中国在贸易上仍然存在很大分歧
items.summary_zh: 自特习会上周在北京结束以来，美国和中国官员多次会面并公开谈论不同的优先事项。

items.title: Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here’s what traders think
items.summary: After new stakes in quantum companies were revealed, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think IonQ, Micron and Anduril could be next.
items.title_zh: 美国政府下一步将入股哪家公司？这是交易者的想法
items.summary_zh: 在量子公司的新股份公布后，预测市场平台 Kalshi 的交易员认为 IonQ、Micron 和 Anduril 可能是下一个。

items.title: U.S. pushes its AI in China and Asia after Trump-Xi meeting
items.summary: Integrating American AI in Asia is high on the agenda for the U.S., according to a senior official for APEC and economic policy.
items.title_zh: 特习会后美国将人工智能推向中国和亚洲
items.summary_zh: 一位负责亚太经合组织和经济政策的高级官员表示，将美国人工智能融入亚洲已成为美国议程的重要议题。

items.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
items.summary: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.
items.title_zh: 中国呼吁亚太经合组织合作，商务部长因“紧急公务”缺席会议
items.summary_zh: 中国国际贸易代表李成钢表示，他正在主持周五的会议，因为商务部部长王文涛有紧急事务需要处理。

items.title: Four killed as school minibus collides with train in Belgium
items.summary: Two schoolchildren, their chaperone and the minibus driver were killed in the crash, says a Belgian minister.
items.title_zh: 比利时学校小巴与火车相撞 造成四人死亡
items.summary_zh: 比利时一位部长表示，两名小学生、他们的监护人和小巴司机在事故中丧生。

items.title: Ebola needs swift response to prevent catastrophe, says DR Congo governor
items.summary: The governor of Ituri said the more time they lose, the closer the province is to disaster.
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国州长表示，埃博拉病毒需要迅速应对，以防止灾难发生
items.summary_zh: 伊图里省省长表示，他们浪费的时间越多，该省离灾难就越近。

items.title: Australia confirms first diphtheria death amid worst outbreak in decades
items.summary: Most cases are in the Northern Territory with some also in Western Australia, South Australia and Queensland.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚确认首例白喉死亡，这是几十年来最严重的疫情
items.summary_zh: 大多数病例发生在北领地，也有一些病例发生在西澳大利亚、南澳大利亚和昆士兰。

items.title: Senegal's sacked PM Sonko elected parliamentary Speaker in challenge to president
items.summary: As speaker, Sonko could use his position to challenge the policies of the president, his one-time ally.
items.title_zh: 塞内加尔被解职总理桑科当选议会议长挑战总统
items.summary_zh: 作为议长，桑科可以利用自己的职位来挑战他曾经的盟友总统的政策。

items.title: Rescuers race to free seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave
items.summary: A team of experts who helped free a teen football team from a Thai cave in 2018 are among the rescuers.
items.title_zh: 救援人员竞相营救被困在被洪水淹没的老挝洞穴中的七人
items.summary_zh: 救援人员中有一支专家团队，他们曾在 2018 年帮助一支青少年足球队从泰国洞穴中解救出来。

items.title: Threat of Deportations Leads to Risky Childbirth for Haitian Mothers
items.summary: Haitian women are having babies in squalid, unsupervised settings after the Dominican Republic started sending immigration agents to detain migrants at hospitals.
items.title_zh: 驱逐的威胁导致海地母亲面临危险的分娩
items.summary_zh: 在多米尼加共和国开始派遣移民人员在医院拘留移民后，海地妇女在肮脏、无人监管的环境中生下孩子。

items.title: Iceland, Rattled by Trump’s Greenland Threats, Weighs Joining the E.U.
items.summary: Iceland has stood apart from the rest of Europe. But President Trump’s threats to Greenland have provoked a reconsideration.
items.title_zh: 冰岛因特朗普的格陵兰威胁而考虑加入欧盟
items.summary_zh: 冰岛在欧洲其他国家中脱颖而出。但特朗普总统对格陵兰岛的威胁引发了人们的重新考虑。

items.title: Inside India’s Manipur State, Where Violence and Division Are Routine
items.summary: Three years after riots tore apart Manipur, the state remains in disarray. Barbed wire and armed checkpoints made it difficult for Times reporters to cross, even before the recent clashes.
items.title_zh: 印度曼尼普尔邦内部，暴力和分裂司空见惯
items.summary_zh: 骚乱使曼尼普尔邦四分五裂三年后，该邦仍处于混乱之中。即使在最近的冲突发生之前，铁丝网和武装检查站也让时报记者难以通过。

items.title: Paris School Worker Tried for Child Abuse in Widespread Assault Inquiry
items.summary: The 36-year-old, named in the French news media as David G., is among more than 70 employees at schools in the capital who have been recently suspended or fired over allegations of sexual abuse and other misconduct.
items.title_zh: 巴黎学校工作人员在广泛的袭击调查中因虐待儿童而受审
items.summary_zh: 法国新闻媒体称这位 36 岁的人为 David G.，他是首都学校 70 多名员工中的一员，这些员工最近因性虐待和其他不当行为指控而被停职或解雇。

items.title: Belgium Crash Kills 4 as Train Hits School Van
items.summary: Two children, 12 and 15, were among those killed in the crash near Brussels, officials said. The students in the van attended a special education school.
items.title_zh: 比利时火车撞上校车相撞事故 4人死亡
items.summary_zh: 官员称，布鲁塞尔附近的坠机事故中丧生的儿童包括两名分别为 12 岁和 15 岁的儿童。车上的学生就读于特殊教育学校。

items.title: Bermuda, the small island nation with huge crypto ambitions
items.summary: The government recently announced it would become the world’s first economy to go fully onchain, a move officials believe will bring its people new opportunities.
items.title_zh: 百慕大，一个有着巨大加密野心的小岛国
items.summary_zh: 政府最近宣布将成为世界上第一个完全上链的经济体，官员们认为此举将为其人民带来新的机遇。

items.title: XRPL could close its biggest DeFi gap if new AMM amendment passes
items.summary: A draft proposal filed Tuesday would extend the XRP Ledger's native automated market maker with three swappable curve types, giving liquidity providers more efficient ways to deploy capital and closing one of XRPL DeFi's longest-standing gaps.
items.title_zh: 如果新的 AMM 修正案获得通过，XRPL 可能会缩小其最大的 DeFi 差距
items.summary_zh: 周二提交的一项提案草案将扩展 XRP Ledger 的本地自动化做市商的三种可互换曲线类型，为流动性提供者提供更有效的方式来部署资本，并缩小 XRPL DeFi 长期存在的缺口之一。

items.title: The Clarity Act won’t lead to adoption without crypto tax reform
items.summary: The legislation is being framed as a turning point for U.S. crypto policy, but there’s a major piece of the puzzle being overlooked, argues Singh.
items.title_zh: 如果没有加密货币税改革，《澄清法案》就不会获得通过
items.summary_zh: 辛格认为，这项立法被视为美国加密货币政策的转折点，但这个难题的一个主要部分被忽视了。

items.title: Bitmine made its largest ETH purchase this year despite Tom Lee's slowdown suggestion
items.summary: The company bought 111,942 ether last week worth $237 million, ramping up purchases to take advantage of ETH's drop below $2,200.
items.title_zh: 尽管 Tom Lee 提出放缓建议，但 Bitmine 仍进行了今年最大的 ETH 购买
items.summary_zh: 该公司上周购买了 111,942 个以太币，价值 2.37 亿美元，利用 ETH 跌破 2,200 美元的机会加大了购买力度。

items.title: Spain blocks Polymarket, Kalshi for operating without licenses amid widening global crackdown on prediction markets
items.summary: Spain blocked Polymarket and Kalshi on May 26, the latest in a growing wave of international crackdowns on prediction markets.
items.title_zh: 全球范围内对预测市场的打击力度不断加大，西班牙禁止 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 无证经营
items.summary_zh: 西班牙于 5 月 26 日封锁了 Polymarket 和 Kalshi，这是国际上对预测市场的打击浪潮中最新的一次。

items.title: UK sanctions HTX over support of Russia in broad sweep over crypto exchanges
items.summary: The United Kingdom sanctioned a large crypto exchange, accusing it of "supporting the government of Russia."
items.title_zh: 英国因支持俄罗斯广泛扫荡加密货币交易所而对 HTX 实施制裁
items.summary_zh: 英国制裁了一家大型加密货币交易所，指责其“支持俄罗斯政府”。

items.title: Hong Kong advances virtual asset advisory and management rulemaking
items.summary: Hong Kong moves to license crypto advisers and managers under anti-money laundering rules, with a 2026 legislative target.
items.title_zh: 香港推进虚拟资产咨询和管理规则制定
items.summary_zh: 香港将根据反洗钱规则向加密货币顾问和管理人员发放许可证，立法目标是 2026 年。

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
items.title_zh: 维珍航空如何利用 Codex 加快运输速度
items.summary_zh: 维珍航空如何使用 Codex 在固定的假日旅行截止日期内发布其改进的移动应用程序，实现接近全部单元测试覆盖率和零 P1 缺陷。

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为企业编码代理领域的领导者
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026 年 Gartner 企业 AI 编码代理魔力象限中被评为领导者，Codex 因创新和企业规模部署而获得认可。

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
items.title_zh: AdventHealth 利用 OpenAI 推进全人护理
items.summary_zh: AdventHealth 正在使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 来简化工作流程、减轻管理负担，并将更多时间用于患者护理。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
items.title_zh: 值得正确使用的工具、脚手架和人工智能代理术语

items.title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title: The Open Agent Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.title_zh: 赶上 Google I/O 2026 的对话舞台。
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
